name: Salmon Scrambled Eggs
recipeIngredient: 7 1/4 oz. can red salmon, drained, bones and skin removed, flaked
1 oz (1/4 cup) shredded Jarlsberg cheese or Swiss cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine eggs, milk, dill weed, pepper, and salt; beat well.
2. In a medium nonstick skillet, melt butter over medium-low heat.
3. Add onions; cook and stir 2 to 3 minutes or until crisp-tender.
4. Add egg mixture; gently stir in salmon.
5. Cook until eggs are set but still moist, stirring constantly.
6. Sprinkle with cheese; cover and cook 1 minute or until cheese is melted.
